mapper.select:
SELECT IK.OWNERKY AS OWNRNAM, IK.FNCUSKY, IK.REGIKEY, IF(TRIM(IK.BFDESKY) = '' OR IK.BFDESKY IS NULL, '', IK.BFDESKY) AS DEORGNM , IK.DENAMLC AS DEMODNM, IF(TRIM(IK.DESTTRG) = '' OR IK.DESTTRG IS NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS DEMODYN, IK.SKUMKEY, WS.WAREKEY , B.BTRCATE FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.IFKSURE IK INNER JOIN ${apiCommon.schema}.WSTKKY WS ON WS.SKUMKEY = IK.SKUMKEY INNER JOIN ${apiCommon.schema}.BTRCAT B ON B.KSGBUN1 = IK.KSGUBUN OR B.KSGBUN2 = IK.KSGUBUN OR B.KSGBUN3 = IK.KSGUBUN
AND IK.IFPRSTS = 'U'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ${schema}.WADJIT ( ADJSOKY, ADJSOIT, WAREKEY, DOCCATE , DOCTYPE, ADJDCST, ADJITST, ADJMODE , ADJGRKY, PARSNCD, ADJSRMK, STOCKKY , AREAKEY, LOCAKEY, LOLAYER, LOTNMKY , STLOTNB, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, OWNERKY , OWNRNAM, SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC , SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUTHIC , PURCNUM, ADDCOKY, ORDERLN, REGIORG , REGIMOD, DESTORG, DEORGNM, DESTMOD , DEMODNM, ITEMCOD , STOTQTY, SALLQTY, SBLOQTY, SUOMKEY , RCVDCDT, LOTAT01, LOTAT02, LOTAT03 , STKSTAT, EMSKUYN, BLOCKID, RCVDCKY , RCVDCIT, PHYSOKY, PHYSOIT, SHPDCKY , SHPDCIT, TASKOKY, TASKOIT, REGIKEY , DESTKEY, STKMEMO , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER ) SELECT #{param.adjsoky} AS ADJSOKY, #{param.adjsoit} AS ADJSOIT, WS.WAREKEY, #{param.doccate} , #{param.doctype}, #{param.adjdcst}, #{param.adjitst}, #{param.adjmode} , #{param.adjgrky}, 'CONVERSION' AS PARSNCD, '이송입고 => 정품입고 전환', WS.STOCKKY , WS.AREAKEY, WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER, WS.LOTNMKY , WS.STLOTNB, WS.CUSTCOD, WS.CUSTNAM, WS.OWNERKY , WS.OWNRNAM, WS.SKUGRKY, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC , WS.SKUWEIG, WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUTHIC , WS.PURCNUM, WS.ADDCOKY, WS.ORDERLN, WS.REGIORG , WS.REGIMOD, WS.DESTORG, WS.DEORGNM, WS.DESTMOD , WS.DEMODNM, WS.ITEMCOD , WS.STOTQTY, WS.SALLQTY, WS.SBLOQTY, WS.SUOMKEY , WS.RCVDCDT, WS.LOTAT01, WS.LOTAT02, WS.LOTAT03 , WS.STKSTAT, WS.EMSKUYN, WS.BLOCKID, WS.RCVDCKY , WS.RCVDCIT, WS.PHYSOKY, WS.PHYSOIT, WS.SHPDCKY , WS.SHPDCIT, WS.TASKOKY, WS.TASKOIT, WS.REGIKEY , WS.DESTKEY, WS.STKMEMO , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMMDD") , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"HH24MISS") , #{param.useract} , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"YYYYMMDD") , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),"HH24MISS") , #{param.useract} FROM ${schema}.WSTKKY WS INNER JOIN ${schema}.IFKSURE IK ON IK.SKUMKEY = WS.SKUMKEY AND IK.IFPRSTS = 'U'
AND WS.SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey}
mapper.sql: ( CASE WHEN (SELECT CDCATE3 FROM MCODEM WHERE COMCDKY = 'ITEMCOD' AND COMCDVL = #{item.itemcod}) = 'PLATE' THEN ( SELECT BA.ADDCOKY FROM ${item.schema}.BADDCO BA WHERE ((BA.MINLENG = 0 OR BA.MINLENG <= #{item.skuleng}) AND (BA.MAXLENG = 0 OR #{item.skuleng} < BA.MAXLENG)) AND ( CASE WHEN (SELECT ORWIDYN FROM BTRCAT WHERE BTRCATE = #{item.btrcate}) = 'Y' THEN (BA.MINWIDT = 0 OR BA.MINWIDT <= #{item.grosswd}) AND (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{item.grosswd} < BA.MAXWIDT) OR (BA.MAXLENG = 0 AND BA.MINLENG <= #{item.skuleng}) OR (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 AND BA.MINWIDT <= #{item.grosswd}) ELSE (BA.MINWIDT = 0 OR BA.MINWIDT <= #{item.skuwidt}) AND (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{item.skuwidt} < BA.MAXWIDT) OR (BA.MAXLENG = 0 AND BA.MINLENG <= #{item.skuleng}) OR (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 AND BA.MINWIDT <= #{item.skuwidt}) END ) AND BA.SYSCDYN = 'N' ) ELSE ( SELECT BAD.ADDCOKY FROM BADDCO BAD WHERE BAD.SYSCDYN = 'Y' ) END )
mapper.update:
/* updateEntranceCar */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WASNHD SET ENTDATE = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{data.entdttm}, '%y%m%d %H%i%s'), '%Y%m%d'), ENTTIME = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{data.entdttm}, '%y%m%d %H%i%s'), '%H%i%s'), ASNITYN = 'Y', LMODATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky} AND VHCFNAM = #{data.vhcfnam}

/* updateEntranceDong */ UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WASNHD SET ENTDOYN = 'Y', LMODATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE EOASNKY = #{param.eoasnky} AND VHCFNAM = #{param.vhcfnam}
mapper.select:
/* selectWasnitStateList */ SELECT EOASNKY, EOASNIT, WAREKEY, ASNITST, SKUMKEY, ULLOCKY, COSTRKY, COSTRIT, UPDTCHK FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.WASNIT WHERE EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky}
AND ASNITST = #{data.asnitst}

/* checkItemInspection */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT WT INNER JOIN ${apiCommon.schema}.WASNIT WAS ON WAS.EOASNKY = WT.EOASNKY AND WAS.SKUMKEY = WT.SKUMKEY WHERE WT.EOASNKY = #{param.eoasnky} AND WT.SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey}
mapper.update:
/* updateItemInspection */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WASNIT SET ASNITST = IF(UPPER(#{data.asnitst}) = 'Y', 'ING', 'CANCEL'), STLAYER = #{data.stlayer}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky} AND SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey}

/* updateHeadInspection */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WASNHD SET ASNSTAT = #{data.asnstat}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky} AND SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey}

/* updateOstritStat */ UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.OSTRIT SET STRITST = #{param.stritst}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE COSTRKY = #{param.costrky} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey}

/* updateOstrhdStat */ UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.OSTRHD SET STRSTAT = #{param.strstat}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE COSTRKY = #{param.costrky}

/* updateInboundStart */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT SET TASKSTS = 'OPERSTR', MVSTDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), MVSTTIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky} AND EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky}
mapper.select: /* selectApiWasnitList */ SELECT EOASNKY, EOASNIT , WAREKEY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY , INVOICE, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, BTRCATE , OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, ASNITST, SKUGRKY , SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, STLAYER , SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUTHIC , GROSSWD, GROSSLN, GROSSWG, GROSSTH , SKUSTRD, ULLOCKY, EQUIPKY, TOAREKY, TOLOCKY, TOLAYER , SUOMKEY, ADDCOKY, ASNDQTY, RCHSQTY , CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, FNCUSKY, FCNAMLC , REGIORG, REGIMOD, DESTORG, DEORGNM, DESTMOD, DEMODNM , DEMODYN, DEMDMAN, DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, DEMDTLN , ITEMCOD, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, BTRFSTC, STLOTNB , SHPLIMT, STKMEMO, DELVDSR, RESTKYN, SKUSTAT , RSNCODE, PARSNNM, COSTRKY, COSTRIT, SERINUM , SAVEPOS, SCHDATE, MIXLOAD, DESTTRG, YARDTRG , INBDATE, INBVHNM, OUBVHNM, SHPDRNM, PRSALDT , CMPDATE, SHPPERS, OUBDATE, PREPRDE, ARVDATE , SHPODAT, TRSODAT, INDIMET, OUTDIMT FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.WASNIT WHERE EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky} AND ASNITST != 'CANCEL'

/* selectApiWasnitCancelList */ SELECT EOASNKY, EOASNIT , WAREKEY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY , INVOICE, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, BTRCATE , OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, ASNITST, SKUGRKY , SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, STLAYER , SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUTHIC , GROSSWD, GROSSLN, GROSSWG, GROSSTH , SKUSTRD, ULLOCKY, EQUIPKY, TOAREKY, TOLOCKY, TOLAYER , SUOMKEY, ADDCOKY, ASNDQTY, RCHSQTY , CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, FNCUSKY, FCNAMLC , REGIORG, REGIMOD, DESTORG, DEORGNM, DESTMOD, DEMODNM , DEMODYN, DEMDMAN, DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, DEMDTLN , ITEMCOD, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, BTRFSTC, STLOTNB , SHPLIMT, STKMEMO, DELVDSR, RESTKYN, SKUSTAT , RSNCODE, PARSNNM, COSTRKY, COSTRIT, SERINUM , SAVEPOS, SCHDATE, MIXLOAD, DESTTRG, YARDTRG , INBDATE, INBVHNM, OUBVHNM, SHPDRNM, PRSALDT , CMPDATE, SHPPERS, OUBDATE, PREPRDE, ARVDATE , SHPODAT, TRSODAT, INDIMET, OUTDIMT FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.WASNIT WHERE EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky} AND ASNITST = 'CANCEL'

/* selectApiWasnitAndTaskData */ SELECT WA.EOASNKY, WA.EOASNIT , WT.TASKOKY, WT.TASKOIT, WR.RCVDCKY, WR.RCVDCIT , WA.WAREKEY, WA.POSHPDT, WA.POSHPTM, WA.POSHPDY , WA.INVOICE, WA.DOCCATE, WA.DOCTYPE, WA.BTRCATE , WA.OWNERKY, WA.OWNRNAM, WA.ASNITST, WA.SKUGRKY , WA.SKUMKEY, WA.SKUDESC, WA.STLAYER , WA.SKUWEIG, WA.SKUWIDT, WA.SKULENG, WA.SKUTHIC , WA.GROSSWD, WA.GROSSLN, WA.GROSSWG, WA.GROSSTH , WA.SKUSTRD, WA.ULLOCKY, WA.EQUIPKY, WA.TOAREKY, WA.TOLOCKY, WA.TOLAYER , WA.SUOMKEY, WA.ADDCOKY, WA.ASNDQTY, WA.RCHSQTY , WA.CUSTCOD, WA.CUSTNAM, WA.FNCUSKY, WA.FCNAMLC , WA.REGIORG, WA.REGIMOD, WA.DESTORG, WA.DEORGNM, WA.DESTMOD, WA.DEMODNM , WA.DEMODYN, WA.DEMDMAN, WA.DEMDADR, WA.DEMPOCD, WA.DEMDTLN , WA.ITEMCOD, WA.PURCNUM, WA.ORDERLN, WA.BTRFSTC, WA.STLOTNB , WA.SHPLIMT, WA.STKMEMO, WA.DELVDSR, WA.RESTKYN, WA.SKUSTAT , WA.RSNCODE, WA.PARSNNM, WA.COSTRKY, WA.COSTRIT, WA.SERINUM , WA.SAVEPOS, WA.SCHDATE, WA.MIXLOAD, WA.DESTTRG, WA.YARDTRG , WA.INBDATE, WA.INBVHNM, WA.OUBVHNM, WA.SHPDRNM, WA.PRSALDT , WA.CMPDATE, WA.SHPPERS, WA.OUBDATE, WA.PREPRDE, WA.ARVDATE , WA.SHPODAT, WA.TRSODAT, WA.INDIMET, WA.OUTDIMT FROM ${data.schema}.WASNIT WA INNER JOIN ${data.schema}.WTAKIT WT ON WT.EOASNKY = WA.EOASNKY AND WT.SKUMKEY = WA.SKUMKEY INNER JOIN ${data.schema}.WRCVIT WR ON WR.EOASNKY = WA.EOASNKY AND WR.SKUMKEY = WA.SKUMKEY WHERE WA.EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky} AND WA.SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey}
/* getApiStockky */ select ${apiCommon.schema}.fn_sm_stockky() as stockky from dual
/* getApiLotnmky */ select ${apiCommon.schema}.fn_sm_lotnmky() as lotnmky from dual
mapper.update:
/* updateInboundTask */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT SET STOCKKY = #{data.stockky}, LOTNMKY = #{data.lotnmky}, TOAREKY = #{data.toareky}, TOLOCKY = #{data.tolocky}, TOLAYER = #{data.tolayer}, TCMPQTY = 1, TASKSTS = 'TASKCMP', LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky} AND EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky} AND SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey}

/* updateInboundApiWstkky */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WSTKKY SET AREAKEY = #{data.toareky}, LOCAKEY = #{data.tolocky}, LOLAYER = #{data.tolayer}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky} AND SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey}
mapper.select: /* selectApiWrcvitList */ SELECT RCVDCKY, WAREKEY, UPDTCHK FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.WRCVIT WHERE EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky} GROUP BY RCVDCKY, WAREKEY
mapper.insert:
/* updateInboundComplete */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT SET TASKSTS = 'OPERCMP', TOAREKY = #{data.toareky}, TOLOCKY = #{data.tolocky}, TOLAYER = #{data.tolayer}, MVEDDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), MVEDTIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky} AND EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky} AND SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey}
mapper.select: /* isApiAsnTaskAllOperCmp */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT WT INNER JOIN ${apiCommon.schema}.WASNHD WH ON WT.EOASNKY = WH.EOASNKY WHERE WT.TASKSTS IN ('NEW', 'OPERSTR', 'TASKCMP') AND WT.EOASNKY = #{data.eoasnky}
